API Reference#

The module include multiple regional MOM6 IO class and methods

class mom6.mom6_module.mom6_io.MOM6Forecast(var, data_relative_dir=None, static_relative_dir=None, tercile_relative_dir=None, grid='raw', source='local', chunks=None)#

Bases: object

Class for getting various mom6 reforecast/forecast - get the mom6 files from reforecast/forecast - get the mom6 tercile from reforecast/forecast - get forecast time stamp …

get_all()#

Return the mom6 all rawgrid/regridded reforecast/forecast field with the static field combined and setting the lon lat related variables to coordinate

Returns:

The Xarray Dataset object is the merged dataset of all forecast field include in the file_list. The Dataset object is lazily-loaded.

Return type:

xr.Dataset

get_init_fcst_time(iyear=1993, imonth=3, lead_bins=None)#

Setup the initial and forecast time format for output

Parameters:

  • iyear (int) – initial year of forecast

  • imonth (int) – initial month

  • lead_bins (List[int]) – The lead_bin used to binned the leading month result example is lead_bins = [0, 3, 6, 9, 12] for four seasonal mean.

Returns:

with two key-value pairs, ‘init’: initial_time and ‘fcst’: mean forecasted during the binned period

Return type:

dict

get_single(iyear=1993, imonth=3)#

Return the mom6 rawgrid/regridded reforecast/forecast field with the static field combined and setting the lon lat related variables to coordinate

Parameters:

  • iyear (int) – initial year of forecast

  • imonth (int) – initial month

Returns:

The Xarray Dataset object is the merged dataset of all forecast field include in the file_list. The Dataset object is lazily-loaded.

Return type:

xr.Dataset

get_tercile(average_type='grid')#

return the mom6 tercile from the forecast

Parameters:

average_type (Literal[&#39;grid&#39;,&#39;region&#39;], optional) – The type of data. Gridded choose ‘grid’ and regional area averaged choose ‘region’, by default ‘grid’

Returns:

A dataset that include the f_lowmid and f_midhigh value which represent SST values at the boundaries between the terciles. f_lowmid represent the boundary value between lower and middle tercile. f_midhigh represent the boundary value between middle and upper tercile. (the filename ‘quantile’ MIGHT be error naming)

Return type:

xr.Dataset

class mom6.mom6_module.mom6_io.MOM6Historical(var, data_relative_dir=None, static_relative_dir=None, grid='raw', source='local', chunks=None)#

Bases: object

Class for various mom6 historical run IO

static freq_find(file_list, freq=None)#

finding the correct data based on input frequency

Parameters:

  • file_list (list) – a list of files with dir path

  • freq (str) – frequency of the data. Default is None.

Returns:

a list with only one element which contain the file need to be read

Return type:

list

Raises:

ValueError – if multiple file present in the file_list but no freq is provided an error message is shown in stdout

get_all(freq=None)#

Return the mom6 all rawgrid/regridded historical run field with the static field combined and setting the lon lat related variables to coordinate

Parameters:

freq (str) – frequency of the data. Default is None.

Returns:

The Xarray Dataset object is the merged dataset of all forecast field include in the file_list. The Dataset object is lazily-loaded.

Return type:

xr.Dataset

get_single(year=1993, month=1, day=1, freq=None)#

Return the mom6 rawgrid/regridded historical run field with the static field combined and setting the lon lat related variables to coordinate

Parameters:

  • year (int) – year of historical run

  • month (int) – month of the historical run

  • day (int) – day in month of the historical run

  • freq (str) – frequency of the data. Default is None.

Returns:

The Xarray Dataset object is the merged dataset of all forecast field include in the file_list. The Dataset object is lazily-loaded.

Return type:

xr.Dataset

class mom6.mom6_module.mom6_io.MOM6Misc#

Bases: object

MOM6 related methods

static mom6_encoding_attr(ds_data_ori, ds_data, dataset_name, var_names=None)#

This function is designed for creating attribute and netCDF encoding for the preprocessed regional mom6 file format.

Parameters:

  • ds_data_ori (xr.Dataset) – original dataset

  • ds_data (xr.Dataset) – new output regridded dataset

  • var_name (string) – var name in the dataset

  • dataset (string) – name of the dataset

Returns:

ds_data – new output regridded dataset with attr and encoding setup.

Return type:

xr.Dataset

static mom6_forecast(forecast_dir)#

Create list of files to be able to be opened by Xarray.

Parameters:

forecast_dir (str) – directory path in string to the forecast/reforecast

Returns:

A list of all data name including directory path for the reforecast/forecast data

Return type:

List

static mom6_historical(historical_dir)#

Create list of files to be able to be opened by Xarray.

Parameters:

historical_dir (str) – directory path in string to the historical run

Returns:

A list of all data name including directory path for the historical run data

Return type:

List

class mom6.mom6_module.mom6_io.MOM6Static#

Bases: object

Class for getting various Static field 1. regional mask in raw regional mom6 grid 2. static file for grid and mask information …

static get_cpi_mask(data_relative_dir)#

return the Cold Pool Index mask in the GLORYS grid.

The mask is currently derived by Chia-Wei Hsu based solely on the avialable GLORYS data.

The mask has three main criterias 1. within EPU MAB (Mid-Atlantic Bight)

=> within (38N-41.5N,75W-68.5W) => within (<41N, <70W)

  1. Only consider bottom temperature between 20m-200m isobath

  2. Long term mean (1993-2022) of annual mean (Jun-Sep) cooler than 10degC

Parameters:

data_relative_dir (str) – relative path from DATAPATH setup in config file to the actual mask data, by setting ‘masks/’ which makes the absolute path to DATAPATH/masks/

Returns:

The Xarray Dataset object of CPI mask in GLORYS grid

Return type:

xr.Dataset

static get_grid(data_relative_dir)#

return the original mom6 grid information

Parameters:

data_relative_dir (str) – relative path from DATAPATH setup in config file to the actual forecast/reforecast data, by setting ‘forecast/’ which makes the absolute path to DATAPATH/forecast/

Returns:

The Xarray Dataset object of mom6’s grid lon lat

Return type:

xr.Dataset

static get_mask(data_relative_dir, mask='wet')#

The function is designed to export the various mask provided on the MOM6 grid from the ocean_static.nc file

Parameters:

  • data_relative_dir (str) – relative path from DATAPATH setup in config file to the actual forecast/reforecast data, by setting ‘forecast/’ which makes the absolute path to DATAPATH/forecast/

  • mask (str) – The mask name based on the variable name in the ocean_static.nc file. It has the following options 1. wet (0 if land, 1 if ocean at tracer points), 2. wet_c (0 if land, 1 if ocean at corner (Bu) points), 3. wet_u (0 if land, 1 if ocean at zonal velocity (Cu) points), 4. wet_v (0 if land, 1 if ocean at meridional velocity (Cv) points), by default ‘wet’.

Returns:

The Xarray DataArray object that represent the ocean mask.

Return type:

xr.DataArray

static get_regionl_mask(data_relative_dir)#

return the EPU mask in the original mom6 grid :type data_relative_dir: str :param data_relative_dir: relative path from DATAPATH setup in config file to

the actual forecast/reforecast data, by setting ‘forecast/’ which makes the absolute path to DATAPATH/forecast/

Returns:

The Xarray Dataset object of regional EPU mask

Return type:

xr.Dataset

static get_rotate(data_relative_dir)#

return the original mom6 grid rotation information

The information is store in the ice_month.static.nc file

Parameters:

data_relative_dir (str) – relative path from DATAPATH setup in config file to the actual forecast/reforecast data, by setting ‘forecast/’ which makes the absolute path to DATAPATH/forecast/

Returns:

The Xarray Dataset object of mom6’s grid lon lat

Return type:

xr.Dataset

class mom6.mom6_module.mom6_io.OpenDapStore(region='northwest_atlantic', grid='raw', data_type='historical')#

Bases: object

class to handle the OPeNDAP request

get_catalog()#

Getting the cataloged files

Returns:

a list of url in the form of string that provide the locations of the data when accessing using opendap

Return type:

list

Raises:

FileNotFoundError – When the files is empty that means the init setting or code must have some incorrect pairing. Debug possibly needed.

previous
